name: totonoe-knowledge
description: 調査や会話を、検索・再利用できるMarkdownナレッジへ整えるVS Code拡張

languageModelTools.name: totonoe-knowledge_saveKnowledge
languageModelTools.userDescription: 会話で整理した内容を確認付きでMarkdownナレッジとして保存します。
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Save a structured internal project knowledge entry as Markdown. Use when the user explicitly asks to record a conclusion, investigation, procedure, decision, specification, change, or troubleshooting result. The tool always asks the user for confirmation before writing. Do not use it for temporary notes or when required facts are still unknown.

title.description: Specific title that identifies the knowledge later

languageModelTools.name: totonoe-knowledge_searchKnowledge
languageModelTools.userDescription: ワークスペースに蓄積したプロジェクトナレッジを検索します。
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search the workspace's internal Markdown knowledge for existing specifications, past investigations, known issues, historical decisions, procedures, or troubleshooting cases. Use when the answer may depend on project-specific history. Return concise references; do not treat results as current without checking their status and scope.

query.description: Search terms derived from the user's question

totonoeKnowledge.repositoryPath.description: ワークスペースからの相対パスで指定するMarkdownナレッジ保存先

enumDescriptions: 登録時にテンプレートまたはLanguage Modelを選択する
外部送信せず固定テンプレートを使用する
VS Codeで選択したLanguage Modelを使用する
totonoeKnowledge.generator.description: ナレッジ案の生成方法

totonoeKnowledge.secretScanning.enabled.description: 外部送信前と保存前に秘密情報らしい文字列を検査する

scripts.package: npm run check && npm test && npm run compile
